name: Software Bill of Materials (SBOM) Attestation
description: Example C++ application for SBOM attestation - Lockheed Martin Corporation. Replace with your software; SBOM pipeline works for any C/C++ project.
author: Lockheed Martin Corporation

custom_components.name: Scheduler Process
custom_components.description: Synthetic process models and random workload generation for scheduling experiments.

custom_components.name: Scheduler Core
custom_components.description: Shared orchestration layer for process scheduling state and timeline coordination.

custom_components.name: Scheduler Algorithms
custom_components.description: FIFO, SJF, and SRT scheduling algorithms over process sets.

custom_components.name: Scheduler Display
custom_components.description: Console tables and comparative metrics output.
